code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Guest as Guest (FinTech_FraudDetection)
    participant Writer as Writer (FinTech_LedgerService)
    participant Editor as Editor (FinTech_FraudDetection)
    participant Admin as Admin (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
    participant CArticle as "Create Article"
    participant EArticle as "Edit Article"
    participant DArticle as "Delete Article"
    participant CComment as "Create Comment"
    participant CReply as "Create Reply"
    participant ManageRoles as "Manage User Roles"


    %% Admin actions
    Admin->>ManageRoles: Can manage user roles
    Admin->>CArticle: Can create article
    Admin->>EArticle: Can edit any article
    Admin->>DArticle: Can delete any article
    Admin->>CComment: Can create comment
    Admin->>CReply: Can create reply


    %% Editor actions
    Editor->>CArticle: Can create article
    Editor->>EArticle: Can edit any article
    Editor->>CComment: Can create comment
    Editor->>CReply: Can create reply


    %% Writer actions
    Writer->>CArticle: Can create article
    Writer->>EArticle: Can edit own article
    Writer->>CComment: Can create comment
    Writer->>CReply: Can create reply

    %% Guest actions
    Guest->>CComment: Can create comment
    Guest->>CReply: Can create reply
repo_description: Backend service for a collaborative multi-author blog platform built with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Socket.io, featuring JWT authentication, dynamic role-based permissions, and real-time comments

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech内容管理系统画一张权限时序图。核心角色有四个：Guest、Writer、Editor和Admin，分别对应FinTech_FraudDetection、FinTech_LedgerService和FinTech_TransactionQueue这几个系统模块。
明白了。那具体的操作对象有哪些？我看到有文章和评论相关的功能，需要我把Create Article、Edit Article这些作为独立参与者画出来吗？
对，操作对象要单独列出来。包括创建文章、编辑文章、删除文章、创建评论、创建回复，还有一个管理用户角色。Admin在TransactionQueue模块里，应该能管理所有用户角色。
好的，我已经把Admin到ManageRoles的连线加上了，标注为"Can manage user roles"。同时Admin也能创建、编辑、删除任何文章，以及发表评论和回复。
Editor和Admin类似，但不能删除文章，也不能管理角色。Writer更受限，只能编辑自己的文章。Guest只能评论和回复，不能碰文章。
我确认一下：Editor可以创建文章、编辑任意文章、评论和回复，但没有删除权限和管理权限。Writer能创建文章，但编辑权限仅限于自己的文章。Guest完全不能操作文章，只能评论和回复。对吗？
完全正确。注意Writer的编辑权限要特别标注"own article"，和Editor的"any article"区分开。
已完成。所有权限连线都按角色层级画好了：Admin权限最全，Editor次之，Writer只能管自己的内容，Guest仅有互动权限。Writer到Edit Article的连线我标注了"Can edit own article"以作区分。
